units: Phase 4 – Infrastructure Layer (DbContext, PolicyService, Seeder, Migration)
Phase 5 – API Layer (Controller, Validation, Health Checks, Logging, OpenAPI)
log: All 6 phases already implemented. Planning and architecture artifacts exist at .docs/PLAN.md and .docs/ARCHITECTURE.md. Orchestrator resumed for review + correction pass only — skip implementer and tester for each unit, begin at reviewer.
Known unresolved MAJORs from REVIEW-phase5.md: MAJOR-01 sort allow-list duplicated (ADR-009), MAJOR-02 A&H enum wire value mismatch (ADR-008).
Previous reviews: .docs/REVIEW-phase1-2.md, .docs/REVIEW-phase4.md, .docs/REVIEW-phase5.md. Previous security scan: .docs/SECURITY-SCAN.md (clean at time of scan).
Final pass started 2026-06-09: single comprehensive reviewer pass over full codebase, then corrector, then security, then documenter.
Reviewer returned NEEDS_CORRECTION (6 findings: 4 MAJOR, 2 MINOR). cycleCounters.reviewCorrection incremented to 1. Corrector spawned.

MAJOR findings: (1) MAJOR-02 still unfixed - [JsonPropertyName] on enum member is inert in .NET 8, 'AandH' still serialised; (2) spec declares 'A&H' as valid filter value but server rejects with 400; (3) System.Text.Json.Serialization leaked into Domain layer; (4) BulkFlagRequest.PolicyIds null bypasses [MinLength(1)]. MINOR findings: (5) SortFields.Default defined but never used; (6) ValidationTests hardcoded 'ValidationTestDb' shared mutable state.

Corrector COMPLETE. Fixes applied and verified: (1) Removed inert [JsonPropertyName] from LineOfBusiness.cs, updated docs/openapi.yaml to use AandH everywhere with spec description note; (2) Added [Required] to BulkFlagRequest.PolicyIds; (3) Changed ValidationTestDb to Guid.NewGuid().ToString() per test; (4) All 'createdAt' literal defaults now reference SortFields.Default. Build: 0 errors, 0 warnings. Tests: 20/20 passed.
Security scan: PASS — no new vulnerabilities introduced by corrections. All changes are refactors or validation tightening. Existing security controls intact.
Documenter COMPLETE. AI-JOURNAL.md final gate entry appended. README.md created. phase set to complete.
